title: Nvidia, CoreWeave, and Nebius: Inside the Circular Financing of the GPU Boom
summary: 分析Nvidia、CoreWeave和Nebius之间的循环融资模式及其对GPU市场的影响。
translated_summary: This article analyzes the circular financing model among Nvidia, CoreWeave, and Nebius, exploring how it fuels the GPU boom and its implications for the AI industry.
